g.text: O(n²) Memory and Compute for Score Matrix

ol.li: Flash Attention: Fused kernels, online softmax; reduces memory to O(n) by not materializing QKᵀ.
Sparse Attention: Global + Local + Random sliding windows (e.g., BigBird); reduces to O(n) or O(n log n).
Linear Attention: Uses kernel trick (φ(Q)φ(K)ᵀ)V to change order of ops; reduces to O(n).
Multi-Query Attention (MQA): Shared K/V across all heads; reduces KV cache size during inference.
Sliding Window Attention: Fixed-size local context; common in Longformer/Mistral.
